title: Support protect-lib without sequential logic
body:
When trying to create a protect-lib without sequential logic, the generated SV wrapper is invalid.
```
%Error: obj_vlt/t_prot_lib_comb/secret/secret.sv:78:14: syntax error, unexpected ')'
   78 |     always @() begin
      |   
```

This PR fixes the error by
1. Check if a clock signal exists or not.
2. Emit sequential logic related code only when a clock exists.

Diff looks big, but most of them are just adding `if (m_hasClk)` condition.
